title: Fabrication & painting of Steel Tubular Pipes for HAIL AND GHASHA ARTIFICIAL ISLANDS CONSTRUCTION PROJECT
content:
Project Name: Fabrication & painting of Steel Tubular Pipes for HAIL AND GHASHA ARTIFICIAL ISLANDS CONSTRUCTION PROJECT.
Client: Arcelor Mittal.
End User: Adnoc.
Project code: 4019017 / 4020020 / 4020025.
Description: Scope - Supply, Fabrication, Inspection, Surface preparation and Painting of steel tubular piles.
Field of activity: Manufacturing Works.

MO 304, Jebel Ali free Zone, Dubai, UAE
